_note: Verified ecosystem catalog seeded 2026-06-14 from the org/npm listing pages in docs/reference/anthropic-foundation-models-integration.md and the redis org. Representative (notable) artifacts per org, not exhaustive; the loader (scripts/load-ecosystem-catalog.ts) is data-driven so rows can be appended. kind: 'repo' (GitHub) | 'npm' (npm package).
